overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through a sunny Los Santos urban environment. The character navigates sidewalks, crosses multiple intersections, passes through a construction trench, and transitions from commercial to residential areas while the camera follows smoothly behind.

events.description: camera turns left to face down the street after crossing the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking across the intersection from the crosswalk toward the opposite sidewalk

tan building with blue trim and beach time signage
overhead traffic signal showing red light
white painted zebra crossing stripes

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a sunny urban intersection with the ego crossing the street. Commercial buildings including a Binco store and Beach Time shop line the streets. The camera turns left after crossing to face down the road.

metal newspaper dispenser on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along a commercial sidewalk, the ego passes a smoke shop and navigates around cardboard boxes and a bench. A large green garbage truck drives past on the left, temporarily blocking the view of the street.

events.description: crossing the street while traffic light shows red
approaching construction barriers on the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: The ego crosses the street toward a construction zone marked by orange barriers. The Ex Post Facto building becomes visible on the left while approaching the excavated area on the right.

construction barriers narrow the visible path through the trench

segments.scene_description: The ego enters a narrow construction trench with dirt ground, navigating between caution tape and traffic barrels. The space is enclosed by barriers, creating a sheltered pathway through the excavated street.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with pharmacy and walk-in salon

events.description: white pharmacy truck pulls out and drives along the street
crossing the street behind the pharmacy truck

agents.ego_description: exiting the construction zone and crossing the street following a pharmacy truck

large blue industrial dumpster on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Exiting the construction zone onto a commercial sidewalk, the ego passes a billboard and blue dumpster before crossing the street behind a white pharmacy truck. A walk-in salon is visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: mixed commercial and residential transition area

events.description: transitioning from commercial to residential architecture with apartment buildings
crossing another intersection with traffic lights

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past a seafood restaurant and approaching residential buildings

white building with distinctive green roof

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions from commercial to residential as the ego walks past a seafood restaurant. A distinctive white church with a green roof appears on the left while brick apartment buildings line the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential neighborhood with apartment buildings and palm trees

events.description: approaching alley entrance with dumpsters and utility boxes
slight turn toward the alley with dumpsters

agents.ego_description: walking through a residential area with palm trees and apartment buildings, approaching an alley entrance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian crossing the street in the distance

entered.detail: multi-story beige apartment complex with balconies

narrow alleyway between buildings with garage doors

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the ego walking through a residential neighborhood lined with palm trees and apartment buildings. The camera approaches an alley entrance with dumpsters, passing by a church building visible in the distance on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunny urban environment that transitions from a bustling commercial district into a quiet residential neighborhood. It begins at a bright intersection where the camera follows the character past storefronts like Binco and Beach Time before turning left to navigate a sidewalk cluttered with cardboard boxes and benches. As a large green garbage truck passes by, the path shifts toward a construction zone, leading the camera through a narrow, dirt-floored trench enclosed by orange barriers and caution tape. The scene then opens back onto a commercial street, passing a pharmacy truck and a walk-in salon before the architecture gradually shifts from shops and seafood restaurants to brick apartment buildings. Finally, the camera glides through a residential area lined with palm trees, passing a white church with a green roof as it approaches a narrow alleyway.
